ddls:
CREATE TABLE "accounts" (
  "account_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each account */,
  "account_name" TEXT /* Name of the account */,
  "account_manager_id" INTEGER /* ID of the account manager */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category the account belongs to */,
  "parent_account_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent account (if any) */,
  "account_description" TEXT /* Description of the account */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("account_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_accounts_parent_account_id FOREIGN KEY ("parent_account_id") REFERENCES accounts ("account_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_accounts_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_accounts_account_manager_id FOREIGN KEY ("account_manager_id") REFERENCES account_managers ("account_manager_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "account_managers" (
  "account_manager_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each account manager */,
  "account_manager_name" TEXT /* Full name of the account manager */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the account manager */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the account manager belongs to */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the account manager */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the account manager was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the account manager was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("account_manager_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the category was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the category was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "financial_data" (
  "financial_data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each financial data entry */,
  "account_id" INTEGER /* ID of the account the data belongs to */,
  "month_id" INTEGER /* ID of the month the data is for */,
  "year_id" INTEGER /* ID of the year the data is for */,
  "fee" TEXT /* Fee associated with the data */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the financial data */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the financial data was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the financial data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("financial_data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_financial_data_account_id FOREIGN KEY ("account_id") REFERENCES accounts ("account_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_financial_data_year_id FOREIGN KEY ("year_id") REFERENCES years ("year_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_financial_data_month_id FOREIGN KEY ("month_id") REFERENCES months ("month_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "months" (
  "month_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each month */,
  "month_name" TEXT /* Name of the month */,
  "month_order" INTEGER /* Order of the month in a year */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the month was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the month was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("month_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "years" (
  "year_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each year */,
  "year_name" TEXT /* Name of the year */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the year was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the year was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("year_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., account manager, financial analyst, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hash of the user's password */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user role was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user role was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id", "role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the role was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the role was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role */,
  "permission_name" TEXT /* Name of the permission */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the permission */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the permission was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the permission was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_permissions_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id")
)
